title: pouteria annamensis
intro: Pouteria annamensis, also known as the Annam pouteria, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, classified in the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Pouteria annamensis are attributed to its leaves and bark, which contain various compounds with potential health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and gastrointestinal issues, with its extracts showing anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Pouteria annamensis include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
